name: CWC Energy Services Corp.
summary: CWC Energy Services Corp., a contract drilling and well servicing company, provides oilfield services to oil and gas exploration and development companies in the Western Canadian Sedimentary Basin. The company operates through two segments, Contract Drilling and Production Services. It offers oilfield services, including drilling rigs, service rigs, and swabbing rigs. The company also provides completion, maintenance, workover, and well decommissioning services. It operates through a fleet of 9 telescopic double drilling rigs with depth ratings from 3,200 to 5,000 meters; 145 service rigs, including 75 single, 56 double, and 14 slant rigs; and 12 swabbing rigs. The company was formerly known as CWC Well Services Corp. and changed its name to CWC Energy Services Corp. in May 2014. CWC Energy Services Corp. is headquartered in Calgary, Canada.
